posts.author: becca_colesoft (Becca C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add an option to save workflows in draft form and set automatic saves at intervals

What are you trying to achieve

Currently, workflows can only be saved once every step is complete and there are no errors in field linkings. However, frequently while building a workflow it will turn out that connections or fields need to be added to a board in order to facilitate the workflow function. Since the workflow can’t be completed without these fields, and field options will not refresh while a workflow is in edit form, the only way to make the necessary changes is to close out of the workflow and start again after the changes are made.

Additionally, very often Monday.com will have an error and cause a page refresh mid-workflow. When the workflow is reopened, all in progress changes have been lost.

If a draft state were an option, Monday could automatically save changes in draft form at intervals, or the user could save a draft in order to make needed changes on a board, without losing all workflow changes to that point.
